summary: Tested iteration 9 features: Admin Assets Library (new tab), Public /investors page, Investor Login with 3 tabs, Footer Quick Links in 2 columns, About page CTA change. All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: 1 test asset already exists in DB (test-asset.pdf)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 9 features verified working. Assets API has full CRUD with visibility controls. Investor access request flow auto-generates invite tokens and sends emails. Three investor login methods available: email/password, legacy password, access code.

details: Assets tab positioned between 'The Den' and 'Activity' in admin nav
Upload panel with asset type, visibility, tags fields
Search and filter functionality (All, Images, PDFs, Scripts, Decks, eBooks, Other)
Asset grid with visibility badges (Public, Investor, Admin)
Hover actions: Preview, Copy URL, Delete
Preview modal with visibility selector and Copy URL button
1 test asset present (test-asset.pdf with investor_only visibility)
Hero section with 'Investors' title and CTAs
Request Investor Access CTA (primary)
View Investment Model CTA (secondary)
Studio Overview section
Investment Model cards (Project-by-Project, Slate Investment)
5 Budget Tiers including 'Seed' tier (Under $10K)
Portal Benefits section (5 benefits listed)
Request Access form with name, email, investor type, area of interest
Two disclaimer checkboxes (confidentiality_ack, risk_ack)
Login link to /investors/login
Three login tabs: Email, Password, Code
Email tab: email + password fields with Sign In button
Password tab: legacy portal password field (investor2024 works)
Code tab: access code field
NDA/Confidentiality Agreement step after successful auth
Risk disclaimer checkbox
'Request access here' link to /investors
Quick Links section with grid-cols-2 layout
8 links present: Home, Films, About, Investors, The Armory, The Den, Work With Us, Contact
Primary CTA: 'Work With Us'
Secondary CTA: 'Invest With Us' (changed from 'Contact')
py-12 used as standard padding across pages (verified in InvestorsPublic, About, Home)

investor_auth.POST /api/investors/login: PASSED - Email/password auth with proper 401 on invalid

investor_access_request.POST /api/investors/request-access: PASSED - Validates acks, generates invite token
